## Description

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] API change (breaking or additive)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] Targets `dev` branch (not `main`)
- [ ] No `@p` usage introduced
- [ ] `internal/` functions are not exposed as public API
- [ ] New hook tags defined with empty `values` JSON
- [ ] `Example/` pack updated if API changed
- [ ] `README.md` updated if API changed
